overview.title: Our Services
overview.subtitle: Complete solutions for your outdoor space
overview.description: From bioclimatic pergolas to aluminium verandas - we offer high-quality constructions that transform your outdoor space.

pergola.title: Bioclimatic Pergola
pergola.subtitle: The ultimate solution for your terrace
pergola.description: Our bioclimatic pergolas combine functionality with elegance. The adjustable aluminium louvres give you complete control over sunlight and ventilation.

benefits.title: Benefits
items: Enjoy your terrace all year round
Perfect protection against sun and rain
Increases the value of your property

items.question: What is the price of a bioclimatic pergola in Belgium?
items.answer: The price of a bioclimatic pergola ranges between €400 and €950 per m² depending on dimensions, options (LED, motorisation, screens) and finishes. For a standard pergola of 15-20m², expect between €8,000 and €15,000 including installation. Request a free quote for an exact price tailored to your project.

items.question: Do I need a building permit for a pergola in Belgium?
items.answer: Generally, a pergola smaller than 40m² does not require a permit in Belgium, but a prior declaration may be required depending on your municipality. We advise you to check with your local administration. We can guide you through these steps.

items.question: How do adjustable louvres work?
items.answer: The adjustable louvres can rotate from 0° to 135° thanks to an electric motor controlled by remote or smartphone. In the closed position, they protect against rain. When open, they let light and air through. A rain sensor can automatically close the louvres.

items.question: What is the lifespan of an aluminium pergola?
items.answer: A powder-coated aluminium pergola has a lifespan of at least 25 to 40 years. Aluminium does not rust, does not warp and is UV resistant. Maintenance is limited to occasional cleaning with soapy water.

items.question: Can a pergola be installed on an existing terrace?
items.answer: Yes, our pergolas can be installed on any type of surface: tiled terrace, wood, concrete or directly on pedestals. We adapt the fixings to your situation. A free technical visit allows us to evaluate the best solutions.

materials.title: European quality materials and brands
materials.description: We exclusively use aluminium profiles from major European brands Reynaers, Aliplast and Cortizo. These thermal break profiles guarantee 25 to 30 years of durability, resistance to impact and the Belgian climate, and powder coating available in over 200 RAL colors. The adjustable louvres are 3mm extruded aluminium, motorized with Somfy or Nice systems with 5-year warranty. Fixings are in A2 or A4 stainless steel for corrosion resistance.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your bioclimatic pergola
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: Our bioclimatic pergolas benefit from a 10-year manufacturer's warranty on the aluminium structure and welds, 5 years on Somfy/Nice motorization and 2 years on accessories (LED, wind/rain sensors). Responsive after-sales service based in Charleroi with intervention within 48 hours.

veranda.title: Aluminium Veranda
veranda.subtitle: Extend your living space
veranda.description: A veranda is the perfect extension of your home. Our aluminium verandas offer excellent insulation and timeless design.

benefits.title: Benefits
items: Extra living space all year round

items.question: What is the price of an aluminium veranda in Belgium?
items.answer: The price of an aluminium veranda ranges between €1,200 and €2,500 per m². For a 15m² veranda, expect between €18,000 and €35,000 depending on options (glazing, roof, finishes). The price usually includes design, manufacturing and installation. Request a free personalised quote.

items.question: Do I need a permit to build a veranda in Belgium?
items.answer: Yes, in Belgium, a planning permit is generally required for a veranda as it changes the external appearance of your home. Rules vary by region (Wallonia, Flanders, Brussels). We guide you through all administrative steps.

items.question: What is the difference between a veranda and a pergola?
items.answer: A veranda is a closed extension of the house, fully glazed and insulated, usable all year round as living space. A pergola is an open or semi-open structure, ideal for enjoying the outdoors with sun protection. Both can be combined.

items.question: How do I heat a veranda in winter?
items.answer: Thanks to thermally broken profiles and double/triple glazing, our verandas retain heat well. Several heating options are possible: central heating extension, heat pump, electric radiators or underfloor heating. We advise the best solution.

items.question: How long does it take to build a veranda?
items.answer: After project approval and obtaining the permit, allow 6 to 10 weeks for manufacturing and 1 to 2 weeks for installation depending on complexity. We plan the work to minimise disruption and ensure impeccable finishing.

materials.title: European quality materials and brands
materials.description: Our verandas are manufactured with thermal break aluminium profiles from Reynaers, Aliplast or Cortizo. Standard double glazing offers a Ug of 1.1, triple glazing drops to 0.6 W/m²K. Profiles are powder-coated in over 200 RAL colors with 10-year warranty against corrosion. The roof can be glass, alveolar polycarbonate or insulated sandwich panels.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your veranda
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: 10-year manufacturer's warranty on the aluminium structure and welds, 10 years on double glazing (loss of seal), 5 years on motorization accessories (Somfy). After-sales service within 48 hours in Charleroi.

carport.title: Aluminium Carport
carport.subtitle: Protection with style
carport.description: Protect your vehicles with a durable and stylish aluminium carport. Fully custom made for your situation.

items.question: What is the price of an aluminium carport in Belgium?
items.answer: The price of an aluminium carport ranges between €3,500 and €8,000 for a single car model, and between €6,000 and €15,000 for a double carport. The price depends on dimensions, roof type and options (LED lighting, side walls). Request a free quote.

items.question: Do I need a permit for a carport in Belgium?
items.answer: Generally, an open carport smaller than 40m² does not require a planning permit, but a declaration may be required. Rules vary by municipality and region. We check the applicable regulations for your situation before any project.

items.question: Carport or garage: which to choose?
items.answer: A carport is less expensive, quicker to install and often does not require a permit. It offers effective protection against rain, sun and frost. A garage offers more security and storage but costs 3 to 4 times more. A carport with walls can be a good compromise.

items.question: Can solar panels be installed on a carport?
items.answer: Yes, our carports are designed to support photovoltaic panels. It's an excellent solution to produce electricity while protecting your vehicle. We work with partners for solar installation.

materials.title: European quality materials and brands
materials.description: Our carports are manufactured with structural aluminium profiles from Reynaers or Aliplast, capable of supporting snow loads up to 200 kg/m² (EN 1991 standard). The posts are sealed on concrete slabs with chemical anchors. The roof can be insulated sandwich panels, 16mm alveolar polycarbonate or ready for solar panels (estimated production 850-950 kWh/kWp/year in Belgium).

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your carport
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: 10-year manufacturer's warranty on the aluminium structure and welds, 10 years on polycarbonate roofing or sandwich panels, 25 years on solar panels (if installed). After-sales service within 48 hours in Charleroi.

window.title: Aluminium & PVC Windows
window.subtitle: Complete window solutions
window.description: High-quality aluminium and PVC windows. Whether you prefer the sleek lines of aluminium or the value-for-money of PVC, we offer custom-made frames with excellent thermal and acoustic insulation.

features.title: Features
items: Aluminium or PVC frames, top quality

benefits.title: Benefits
items: PVC: great value for money, maintenance-free
Eligible for energy grants in Belgium

items.question: What is the price of aluminium and PVC windows in Belgium?
items.answer: PVC windows start from €250/m² and aluminium windows from €450/m², installation included. Price varies based on glazing type, opening mechanism and finishes. Energy grants can significantly reduce your investment.

items.question: Aluminium or PVC: which windows to choose?
items.answer: PVC offers excellent value with great insulation and virtually no maintenance. Aluminium offers slimmer profiles for more light, superior durability and a more contemporary design. We also offer mixed aluminium-PVC solutions combining the best of both.

items.question: What grants are available for window replacement in Belgium?
items.answer: In Wallonia, the Housing Grant can cover up to 70% of costs. In Brussels, RENOLUTION grants are available. In Flanders, the Mijn VerbouwPremie applies. We guide you through the process to maximise your grants.

items.question: How long does window installation take?
items.answer: Window replacement typically takes 1 to 3 days depending on the number. We work cleanly and ensure your home stays secure and insulated throughout.

items.question: Do PVC windows yellow over time?
items.answer: Modern PVC windows are UV-treated and no longer yellow. Our PVC frames retain their colour throughout their lifespan (30+ years). Available in white, anthracite grey, and many other colours.

materials.title: Materials and thermal performance
materials.description: Our aluminium windows are equipped with thermal break profiles from Reynaers or Cortizo, achieving a Uw of 0.8 W/m²K with triple glazing and argon gas. Premium PVC profiles offer a Uw between 1.1 and 1.5 W/m²K. All our glazing complies with the EN 14351-1 standard and is PEB certified for Wallonia. Roto or Maco multi-point fittings offer RC2 anti-burglary security.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your window
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: 10-year manufacturer's warranty on profiles and glazing (loss of seal), 5 years on fittings and opening mechanisms, 2 years on seals. Responsive after-sales service within 48 hours.

shutter.title: Roller Shutters
shutter.subtitle: Security and comfort
shutter.description: Electric and manual roller shutters for optimal protection and privacy. Control via switch, remote or smartphone.

items.question: How much does an electric roller shutter cost in Belgium?
items.answer: The price of a motorized aluminium roller shutter ranges from €350 to €750 per window depending on size, motorization, color and box type (renovation or tunnel). For a complete house with 8 to 12 windows, expect between €4,500 and €9,500 installed. Double-wall aluminium with insulating foam offers the best value for the Belgian climate and saves up to 8% on your heating bill.

items.question: Aluminium or PVC roller shutter: which to choose?
items.answer: Aluminium is recommended for its durability (25-30 years), impact resistance, weather resistance and slim profiles. PVC is cheaper to purchase but deforms under high heat and yellows over time. For Belgium we systematically recommend aluminium with polyurethane foam for thermal and acoustic insulation. Aluminium also allows custom RAL colors and larger dimensions.

items.question: Is a permit required for roller shutters in Belgium?
items.answer: For a classic installation on an existing home, no urban planning permit is required in Wallonia, Brussels or Flanders if the shutters are identical in color and style. However, in listed districts, protected buildings or Natura 2000 zones, a declaration or permit may be necessary. We systematically verify your property's situation before installation and handle the procedures if needed.

items.question: Can roller shutters be integrated with home automation?
items.answer: Yes, all our motorized roller shutters are compatible with Somfy, Nice, Bubendorff and iO-homecontrol home automation systems. You can control your shutters from your smartphone, program automatic scenarios (morning opening, night closing, sun detection), and integrate with Google Home, Alexa or Apple HomeKit. Solar-powered shutters without wiring also exist, ideal for renovation.

items.question: How long does roller shutter installation take?
items.answer: For a classic 10-window home, installation typically takes 1 to 2 days depending on type (surface-mounted renovation or tunnel integrated in masonry). Custom manufacturing requires 4 to 6 weeks after quote approval. Our certified technicians handle electrical wiring, home automation connection and commissioning before training you on your installation's use.

materials.title: Materials and home automation systems
materials.description: Our roller shutters are made with double-wall aluminium slats filled with polyurethane foam for optimal thermal and acoustic insulation. The box can be surface-mounted (renovation) or tunnel (integrated in masonry). Somfy, Nice or Bubendorff motors offer 5-year warranty and are compatible with iO-homecontrol, Google Home, Alexa and Apple HomeKit home automation systems. Available in over 200 RAL colors.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your shutter
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: 10-year manufacturer's warranty on aluminium slats and box, 5 years on Somfy/Nice/Bubendorff motorization, 2 years on electronic accessories. After-sales service within 48 hours in Charleroi.

garage.title: Garage Doors
garage.subtitle: Safe and comfortable
garage.description: Sectional and up-and-over garage doors with electric operation. Safe, insulated and stylishly designed.

items.question: How much does a sectional garage door cost in Belgium?
items.answer: The price of a motorized sectional garage door ranges from €1,800 to €4,500 depending on dimensions, motorization type, insulation and options (windows, wicket door, RAL color). For a standard 2.50m × 2.00m door with a Hörmann or Somfy motor, expect around €2,400 installed. Double-wall 40mm doors offer the best compromise between thermal insulation (up to U=1.4 W/m²K) and budget.

items.question: Sectional or up-and-over door: which to choose?
items.answer: The sectional door is the recommended modern choice: it opens vertically along the ceiling, requires no space in front of the garage, offers better insulation and enhanced security. The up-and-over door, more economical, requires outward clearance and offers less weatherproofing. For recent homes and renovations, the sectional is preferred in 90% of cases due to its thermal performance and user comfort.

items.question: Which motorization to choose for a garage door?
items.answer: Hörmann, Somfy, Nice and Marantec dominate the Belgian market with 5 to 10 year warranties. Choose an 800N motor for doors up to 10m², 1000N for larger or double doors. Essential features include: 433 MHz remote control, obstacle detection, partial opening (ventilation), integrated LED lighting and home automation compatibility. WiFi motors enable smartphone control and remote opening.

items.question: Is a planning permit required to change a garage door?
items.answer: Identical replacement of a garage door requires no permit in Wallonia, Brussels and Flanders. However, if you modify the opening dimension (widening, raising), an urban planning declaration is required. In protected zones or for listed buildings, we recommend consulting your municipality's planning department. We handle all administrative formalities if needed.

items.question: How long does garage door installation take?
items.answer: Replacing an existing garage door typically takes 1 day for installation and electrical connection. Custom manufacturing requires 3 to 5 weeks after quote approval. Installation includes: removal of the old door, rail installation, panel assembly, motor installation, adjustments, remote programming and user training. A manufacturer's warranty of 10 years on the structure and 5 years on the motorization is standard.

materials.title: Quality materials and motorization
materials.description: Our sectional garage doors are manufactured with 40mm double-wall steel panels filled with polyurethane foam, achieving a coefficient U=1.4 W/m²K. Hörmann, Somfy, Nice or Marantec motors offer 5 to 10 year warranties with 800N motors (doors up to 10m²) or 1000N (larger doors). WiFi home automation compatibility, 433MHz remote control, obstacle detection and integrated LED lighting.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Archi for your garage
items: Free personalized on-site study with 3D rendering within 48 hours
Custom manufacturing in our workshops in Belgium, rigorous quality control
Installation by our own certified technicians, no subcontracting
Complete management of urban planning permits if necessary
Reduced VAT 6% for homes over 10 years old
10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure, 5 years on motorization

warranty.title: Specific warranties
warranty.description: 10-year manufacturer's warranty on structure and steel panels, 5 years on Hörmann/Somfy/Nice motorization, 2 years on remotes and electronic accessories. After-sales service within 48 hours in Charleroi.
